response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified two distinct musical performances and a skit segment. 2. Performed OCR on on-screen text to identify songs: 'SUNDAY NIGHT MAGIC' and '童月アン・ドゥ・トロワ' (by DATEKEN). 3. Conducted web searches for lyrics. 'SUNDAY NIGHT MAGIC' appears to be an original song, lyrics unavailable. Found official lyrics for '蜜月Un·Deux·Trois' (the likely source for '童月アン・ドゥ・トロワ') and confirmed they match the video subtitles. 4. Constructed final JSON.
response.global_summary: A 3D showcase video featuring two vocal performances by VTubers Kobo Kanaeru, Sakura Miko, Oozora Subaru, and Hakui Koyori, interspersed with a talking segment.

scenes.description: The performers Kobo Kanaeru, Sakura Miko, and Oozora Subaru perform the song 'SUNDAY NIGHT MAGIC'. The stage features colorful neon star decorations and a rainbow.
scenes.performer_in_video: Kobo Kanaeru, Sakura Miko, Oozora Subaru
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: (Full original lyrics not available for this original song)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: (Full English translation not available for this original song)

scenes.description: A skit and talking segment between Kobo Kanaeru, Sakura Miko, and Hakui Koyori on stage. No vocal music is playing.
The performers Kobo Kanaeru, Hakui Koyori, and Sakura Miko perform the song '童月アン・ドゥ・トロワ' (Dougetsu An Deux Trois). Text on screen indicates 'Lyrics,Music: DATEKEN'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Kobo Kanaeru, Hakui Koyori, Sakura Miko
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
誰も居なくなった
二人だけの街に
機械仕掛けの時計が
夜の訪れ知らせる
夕暗が空を
ワイン色に染めて
不慣れな二人を
舞台へと誘う
Chasse 'n' Whisk 'n' Natural-Turn
貴方に魔法をあげる
Throwaway and Oversway
その名前は honey mead
蜜月 Un·Deux·Trois
互いの指を絡めて
Singin' swingin' sweetest song
二人の夢を奏でる
Chasse 'n' Whisk 'n' Natural-Turn
貴女に魔法をかける
Throwaway and Oversway
魅惑の蜜 honey mead
蜜月 Un·Deux·Trois
その唇を重ねて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Nobody is left
In the city of just the two of us
The mechanical clock
Announces the arrival of night
The dusk dyes the sky
In the color of wine
Inviting the two of us, who are still inexperienced
To the stage
Chasse 'n' Whisk 'n' Natural-Turn
I'll give you a magic
Throwaway and Oversway
Its name is honey mead
Honeymoon Un-Deux-Trois
We intertwine our fingers
Singin' swingin' sweetest song
Playing the dreams of us two
Chasse 'n' Whisk 'n' Natural-Turn
I'll cast a magic on you
Throwaway and Oversway
Captivating honey mead
Honeymoon Un-Deux-Trois
We overlap our lips
